creator: alumina@ceramix.compress.to
text:
Upgrade the libX11 and reverse dependencies from ports, then became can't input japanese in gtk(mm) apps.
In gtk(mm) apps, can activate input method, but can't input japanese, hung-up.
Tested input method is uim-xim, and kinput2.
Can input japanese in kterm(kinput2) and wish8.6 app(uim-xim).


I want reinstall old version of package, but can't reinstall downloaded package file in pkg command.
Force install new version of package by pkg command, can't select downloaded package file.
Other method, I'm not found print version list of package in pkg command help.
